overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player moves through neon-lit streets, passes under massive overpasses, and observes the cyberpunk architecture of Night City while rain creates reflective wet surfaces throughout the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with vendor stalls and security fencing

events.description: passing by a street vendor cart with red and yellow umbrella on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk, observing the neon-lit street and passing vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart under colorful umbrella

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with vertical bars running along the sidewalk edge
towering glass building with blue neon grid lighting and illuminated windows
concrete and metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle street
large red digital advertisement screen with animated graphics
food cart with red and yellow umbrella and illuminated menu displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, bordered by a tall metal security fence on the left and a concrete road barrier on the right. The player walks forward past a street vendor cart, with a massive neon-lit glass skyscraper dominating the view ahead. The wet concrete reflects the colorful neon lights from surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway overpass with Japanese-style food stall

events.description: entering covered area beneath highway overpass with distinct lighting change

agents.ego_description: walking past a ramen food stall with hanging red paper lanterns under the overpass

notable_agents.action: chef in pink shirt working at the food stall counter preparing food

entered.detail: massive concrete underside of elevated highway creating covered walkway
traditional Japanese red paper lanterns with black kanji characters hanging from food stall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, where the lighting shifts to a mix of green neon from a Japanese-style food stall and ambient city glow. Red paper lanterns hang prominently from the ramen stall as the player passes by, with a chef visible working at the counter. The environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath mega-structure with industrial grid ceiling

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive geometric building structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the road under the overpass then looking up at the massive architecture

entered.detail: massive concrete structure with geometric waffle-grid pattern and red neon strip lighting
bright blue LED grid lighting covering the glass facade of the tower above
concrete road barrier with continuous red LED strip lighting on top

segments.scene_description: Walking along the asphalt road beneath the massive underbelly of a mega-structure, the environment is dark and enclosed with industrial lighting. The player continues forward then tilts the camera upward to reveal the awe-inspiring scale of the building above, featuring a geometric grid ceiling with red neon strips and a brilliant blue LED facade on the tower rising into the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with large digital billboards and pedestrian crossing

events.description: camera tilts back down from looking up to street level view
waiting at crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk with other pedestrians holding umbrellas, observing the passing traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding black umbrella waiting at crosswalk
blue vintage-style car driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: large red digital billboard displaying white samurai mask graphic with Japanese text
digital screen showing close-up of lips with cigarette and smoke
massive digital display showing woman with open mouth in aggressive pose
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with wait signals

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level, revealing a wide intersection dominated by massive digital billboards displaying cyberpunk advertisements including a samurai mask and screaming woman. The player approaches a zebra crosswalk where pedestrians with umbrellas wait for traffic. A blue vintage car drives through the wet intersection as the rain continues to fall, creating reflective surfaces on the asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city sidewalk into the sheltered depths of a mega-structure before emerging into a wide, neon-drenched intersection. It begins by moving past a street vendor and a metal security fence, where the wet concrete reflects the glow of a towering glass skyscraper. As the camera enters a covered walkway beneath a highway overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting from open rain to the warm light of red paper lanterns and a Japanese-style food stall. The scene then transitions into the dark, industrial underbelly of a massive building, where the camera tilts upward to reveal a geometric grid ceiling with red neon strips and a brilliant blue LED facade. Finally, the view returns to street level at a bustling intersection, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and a blue vintage car amidst massive digital billboards and reflective asphalt.
